note: Best-effort Korean name suggestions for items_unmatched. Korean item titles were matched from the uploaded Korean JSON files when possible; quantity/location suffixes were normalized. Non-item map markers such as graces, bosses, dungeons, npcs, and waygates were not translated because the uploaded source files are item-oriented. User-requested Korean term corrections were applied globally to suggested Korean names and related string fields.

not_translated_marker_categories_from_in.graces: Not changed: grace flags match local English tables, but there is no confirmed English-to-Korean FMG id mapping yet.
not_translated_marker_categories_from_in.bosses: Not changed: boss flags mostly match local English tables, but there is no confirmed English-to-Korean FMG id mapping yet.
not_translated_marker_categories_from_in.dungeons: Not changed: no stable id on marker rows. PlaceName.fmg has Korean names but no English id bridge in current map data.
not_translated_marker_categories_from_in.npcs: Not changed: npc_id is null for all npc markers, so NpcName.fmg cannot be safely joined.
not_translated_marker_categories_from_in.waygates: Not changed: no stable id; names are descriptive labels.
